svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ FACE EMBEDDING ARCHITECTURES │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
FaceNet (2015): ArcFace (2019): ────────────── ────────────── • Inception backbone • ResNet backbone • 128-dim embeddings • 512-dim embeddings • Triplet loss training • Angular margin loss • ~99% LFW accuracy • ~99.8% LFW accuracy
InsightFace / ArcFace Loss: ───────────────────────────
Standard Softmax: L = -log(e^(W_y·x) / Σ e^(W_j·x))
ArcFace: L = -log(e^(s·cos(θ_y + m)) / (e^(s·cos(θ_y + m)) + Σ e^(s·cos(θ_j))))
where: • θ_y = angle between feature x and weight W_y • m = angular margin (typically 0.5) • s = scale factor (typically 64)
Effect: Forces larger angular separation between classes
